content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — demo credentials exist (demo_user.txt/demo_password.txt) but notes.txt just says "n/a", giving no guidance on reaching the subscription paywall or blocking/reports features (fastlane/metadata/review_information/notes.txt:1).
Pierre: Apple's reviewers need explicit steps to reach gated functionality, especially subscription paywalls (App/PaywallView.swift:7-9) and Screen Time-style blocking features — credentials alone aren't enough if the reviewer can't tell how to trigger the paywall or bypass IAP for testing. Please replace "n/a" with concrete steps (e.g. "Sign in, tap Focus tab, Subscribe button opens paywall; use sandbox account to test purchase") to avoid a rejection or review delay.
